content: /* Chickadee Chat — component styles (tokens & globals live in theme.css). */

/* Sidebar-only "compact mode" (dock-style window): hide everything except the
   sidebar; the main process shrinks the OS window to match (see main/index.ts). */
/* Keyboard-only focus ring (mouse clicks don't trigger :focus-visible). */

/* ── Button primitive (.btn) ─────────────────────────────────
   Composable button base + variants on the lean tokens (--dur-1,
   --veil-1/2, --r-1, --s-*, --fs-*, --fw-*). Focus ring comes from the
   global button:focus-visible rule above.

   Adopted by: primary CTAs (modal-action/welcome__btn/crash → btn--primary),
   danger (leave/reset → btn--danger), low-emphasis danger (unbind →
   btn--danger-soft), welcome-wizard Back → btn--ghost.

   Left bespoke on purpose (specialized layout / state / context, not generic
   buttons): .ctrl-btn (column icon+label + variants), .pill (chat on/off
   toggle), .winctl__btn (titlebar), .send-btn (fixed gradient icon), and the
   structural tiles / rows / dropdowns / seg / grid / srccard / swatch.

   Compose: base + one color variant (+ size), e.g.
     <button class="btn btn--primary">      CTA
     <button class="btn btn--ghost">        secondary
     <button class="btn btn--danger">       destructive confirm
     <button class="btn btn--danger-soft">  low-emphasis destructive */
/* Primary — brand gradient CTA (modal-action, send-btn, crash, avatar save). */

/* Ghost — transparent; fills with an ink veil on hover, deeper on press
   (winctl, self-settings, emoji-trigger, space-copy, version-btn). */
/* Danger (solid) — destructive confirm (leave-btn, ctrl/mini --danger). */
/* Danger (soft) — low-emphasis destructive (reset settings, unbind). */
/* Size / shape modifier. */

/* ── Menu surface primitive ──────────────────────────────────
   Shared floating-panel look for dropdowns / popovers / context
   menus. --frosted swaps the solid fill for a translucent blur.
   Components add their own position / width / padding / animation
   (and any radius/blur deviation) on top. */

/* ── Avatar primitive ──────────────────────────────────────── Rounded-square avatar holder on a 1:2:4 size scale (24/48/96). Centers a letter initial; an optional child covers and inherits the radius, so it stays clipped even when a holder opts into overflow:visible (e.g. the tile speaking ring + mute badge). */

/* Drag handle on the sidebar's right edge — resizes the panel (full view) or the
   docked window (compact, via IPC). no-drag so it overrides the header drag region.
   The element is a wider invisible hit area; the visible highlight is the thin
   `::after` line at the very edge. */

/* Click-to-collapse room category header (VOICE / VIDEO). Reuses .sidebar__label
   typography but is a full-width button with a leading rotating chevron. */

/* The VIDEO header sits below the voice list — give it breathing room like the
   old label's :not(:first-child) top padding. */
/* Compact occupancy badge (n/cap) — a smaller sibling of .room-header__count. */
/* Full room: red badge + signals the row is unjoinable. */

/* Active (joined) room, both modes: a green speaking ring (pulled inward) on
   talking users' avatars. Only the current room ever gets the speaking class. */
/* Active room (both modes): avatars are click-to-mute other users. */

/* Press feedback bounces the avatar itself; cancel the row's press-scale so the
   whole bar doesn't bounce when you click an (inline) avatar to mute. */
/* A silenced peer: white speaker-off icon over a subtle red dim. */
/* Active room (both modes): full-width avatar roster on its own line (fits all ~8). */
/* In the active/joined room, make the avatars larger (27px) to match the control buttons. */

/* Mini voice controls shown under the active room's row in compact mode
   (mute / deafen / cycle input-mode, + an optional right-aligned leave-video).
   Fixed light/orange/red button colors (rather than the room row's --block-bg)
   keep these legible in either theme. Spans the row so --end can push right. */
/* Pushed to the right edge of the row (e.g. the leave-video button). */
/* Muted / deafened: solid red reads unmistakably as "off". */

/* When the window is unfocused (e.g. on a 2nd monitor while a game has focus),
   freeze the per-frame animations to save GPU/CPU. Static cues remain: the speaking
   ring/glow is a static, opacity-toggled .tile__avatar::after (and a tile border for
   camera-on tiles), and presence dots keep their solid color — only the motion stops. */

/* Speaking cue for voice-only tiles (camera off, not screen-sharing): a solid accent
   ring + colored glow around the avatar, toggled by opacity only (compositor-friendly)
   so it looks identical focused/unfocused and never animates per-frame. Gated off while
   minimized via the `showSpeaking` prop in JS. */

/* Above the avatar speaking ring (.tile__avatar::after) so the mute/deafen badge
     is never hidden under the ring. */

/* Per-listener volume: bottom-left icon (click to silence) in a pill that
   expands to the right on hover to reveal a horizontal slider. */
/* collapsed: icon only; slider + label clipped */
/* Opt-in video: centered "Watch" button shown over an un-joined peer's avatar. */
/* Opt-in video: bottom-right "stop watching" button on a joined camera tile. */
/* Self stream: small "N watching" chip, top-left of the presentation. */
/* Joined remote stream: top-right "stop watching" button. */
/* Uppercase micro section-label primitive. */

/* ── Backdrop primitive ──────────────────────────────────────
   Full-screen layer. Bare .backdrop = transparent click-catcher
   (closes popovers/menus on outside click). --scrim dims + centers
   its child (modals). z-index is set per call site since stacking
   order is context-specific. */
/* Wide variant — e.g. the screen-share source picker. */
/* Square icon button — modal/settings closes + bare icon actions. */
/* Text input primitive (modal / form fields). */
/* Settings rows (label + control) */
/* Indented sub-row (e.g. SFX sub-toggles); .is-disabled greys it out. */
/* Toggle switch */
/* Push-to-talk rebind button */
/* PTT Hold/Toggle segmented control */
/* Side-by-side Mode (left) + Key (right) in the room chevron menus. */
/* ── Room right-click context menu ────────────────────────── */
/* Welcome / first-run name modal */
/* ── Screen-share picker — uses the shared .modal-panel shell ── */
/* ── Settings Panel Layout (Discord-inspired) ──────────────── */
/* Settings search widget */

/* Left buffer so focus-ring outlines + the active accent swatch's 4px halo aren't
     clipped at x=0 by this scroll container's overflow. */
/* Redesigned Push-to-talk/Mute elements */
/* Fixed-size icon residual; colors + mechanics come from .btn .btn--danger-soft. */
/* ── Room Modal Icon Picker Search & Container ────────────── */
/* Custom scrollbar for room icon container */

/* Component theming is handled inline above via design tokens (theme.css defines
   the single "Alabaster Editorial" theme in :root). */
